name: The Caddy Shack Indoor Golf and Fun
about: The Caddy Shack Indoor Golf and Fun is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers a unique blend of golf and entertainment. The facility provides a space for golfers to practice their swing or play virtual rounds regardless of weather conditions. The venue is designed to accommodate both casual players and those looking for a more serious golf experience, combining technology with a fun atmosphere. Pricing and specific offerings are currently unavailable, suggesting the venue may be undergoing maintenance or updates.

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available with a casual dining menu
Full bar service with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you can bring your own if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full bar and kitchen food, but outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes take 1-2 hours depending on simulator wait times and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Caddy Shack Indoor Golf and Fun is designed to be family-friendly with activities suitable for kids.
